projects.name: The years between us
projects.shortDesc: A speculative design project exploring transgenerational memory — combining a digital archive with an analogue card game.
projects.desc:
Some things are passed down. Others are not.

"Between Us, the Years" is a bachelor's thesis project exploring the transgenerational transmission of wartime experiences and their lasting effects on family and social relationships in the present day. At its core are the memories, attitudes, and relational patterns that continue to shape us across generations — often without our awareness.

The project combines an interactive digital application with an analogue dialogue and card game, opening up different ways of engaging with the subject. One part of the project can be experienced online at zwischen-uns-die-jahre.vercel.app
